targets.rawSql:
WITH w AS (
    SELECT 'azone' AS zone_nm, '사과' AS item_nm, 10 AS val UNION ALL
    SELECT 'azone', '배', 20 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'azone', '딸기', 30 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'azone', '토마토', 10 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'bzone', '사과', 11 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'bzone', '배', 20 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'bzone', '딸기', 30 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'bzone', '토마토', 10 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'czone', '사과', 11 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'czone', '배', 20 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'czone', '딸기', 30 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'czone', '토마토', 10 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'dzone', '사과', 11 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'dzone', '배', 20 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'dzone', '딸기', 30 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'dzone', '토마토', 10
)
SELECT 
    zone_nm,
    item_nm,
    val
FROM w
ORDER BY zone_nm ASC, item_nm ASC
